identity.name: ImmigrationPortal
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Primary (Document Focus) with Dark Sidebar (Navigation)

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer hover:border-blue-200

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.approved: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-700
status_badges.pending: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-amber-700
status_badges.rejected: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700
status_badges.draft: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar (Fixed Left) + Header (Sticky Top) + Main Content (Scrollable)

universal_guidelines: Use 'Inter' for all UI text and 'Merriweather' for Page Titles (h1, h2).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
All interactive elements must have a hover state (change color or shadow).
Tables must be dense and readable, avoiding excessive padding in rows.
Mobile responsiveness is mandatory: Stack grids to 1 column on mobile.
Do not use 'alert()' or 'confirm()'; use Shadcn Dialogs.
Ensure high contrast for text (Slate 600+ on white).
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype. Build a professional, trust-inducing interface. Prioritize clarity in data presentation. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Implement role-based layouts as defined.
